originalContent:
STATEMENT OF WORK

Project: Digital Transformation Initiative
Client: Acme Corporation
Vendor: GlobalTech Consulting LLC
Effective Date: January 1, 2024
End Date: December 31, 2024

SCOPE OF WORK:
GlobalTech will provide IT professional services for Acme's digital transformation project including software development, cloud architecture, data engineering, and project management.

RATE CARD:

Software Development:
- Senior Software Developer: $950/day (8 resources)
- Software Developer: $750/day (15 resources)
- Junior Software Developer: $450/day (10 resources)

Cloud & Infrastructure:
- Senior Cloud Architect: $1,100/day (4 resources)
- Cloud Engineer: $850/day (8 resources)
- DevOps Engineer: $800/day (6 resources)

Data & Analytics:
- Senior Data Engineer: $1,000/day (5 resources)
- Data Engineer: $750/day (10 resources)
- Data Analyst: $600/day (8 resources)

Project Management:
- Senior Project Manager: $1,200/day (3 resources)
- Project Manager: $900/day (5 resources)
- Scrum Master: $750/day (6 resources)

Quality Assurance:
- Senior QA Engineer: $800/day (4 resources)
- QA Engineer: $600/day (8 resources)
- Test Automation Engineer: $700/day (6 resources)

Business Analysis:
- Senior Business Analyst: $950/day (4 resources)
- Business Analyst: $700/day (8 resources)

Security:
- Security Architect: $1,300/day (2 resources)
- Security Engineer: $950/day (4 resources)

TOTAL CONTRACT VALUE: $45,000,000
ESTIMATED FTE DAYS: 50,000
PAYMENT TERMS: Net 30
LOCATION: USA (Mixed onshore/nearshore)
CURRENCY: USD

TERMS AND CONDITIONS:
- All rates are daily rates based on 8-hour workdays
- Resources will be assigned based on project needs
- Rates are fixed for the contract duration
- Travel expenses will be billed separately
- Resources can be scaled up or down with 2 weeks notice

Signed: John Anderson, VP of IT, Acme Corporation
Date: January 1, 2024

Signed: Maria Rodriguez, Managing Director, GlobalTech Consulting
Date: January 1, 2024
